items.summary_en: OpenAI newsroom changed. Most visible article: "Testing Ads In Chatgpt".
items.evidence_excerpt: title=Testing ads in ChatGPT published=Thu, 07 May 2026 00:00:00 GMT link=https://openai.com/index/testing-ads-in-chatgpt description=OpenAI begins testing ads in ChatGPT to support free access, with clear labeling, answer independence, strong privacy protections, and user control. title=How frontier firms are pulling ahead title=OpenAI models, Codex, and Managed Agents come to AWS published=Tue, 28 Apr 2026 00:00:00 GMT link=https://openai.com/index/openai-on-aws description=OpenAI GPT models, Codex, and Managed Agents are now available on AWS, enabling enterprises to build secure AI in their AWS environments.
diff_excerpt: description=Explore new realtime voice models in the OpenAI API that can reason, translate, and transcribe speech, enabling more natural and intelligent voice experiences.
+description=OpenAI begins testing ads in ChatGPT to support free access, with clear labeling, answer independence, strong privacy protections, and user control.
description=Introducing Trusted Contact in ChatGPT, an optional safety feature that notifies someone you trust if serious self-harm concerns are detected.
-title=Uber uses OpenAI to help people earn smarter and book faster
-description=Uber uses OpenAI to power AI assistants and voice features that help drivers earn smarter and riders book faster across a global real-time marketplace.
description=OpenAI outlines a five-part action plan for strengthening cybersecurity in the Intelligence Age, focused on democratizing AI-powered cyber defense and protecting critical systems.
-title=OpenAI models, Codex, and Managed Agents come to AWS
-description=OpenAI GPT models, Codex, and Managed Agents are now available on AWS, enabling enterprises to build secure AI in their AWS environments.
description=Learn how OpenAI protects community safety in ChatGPT through model safeguards, misuse detection, policy enforcement, and collaboration with safety experts.
-description=OpenAI is available at FedRAMP Moderate authorization for ChatGPT Enterprise and the OpenAI API, enabling secure AI adoption for U.S. federal agencies.
+title=OpenAI models, Codex, and Managed Agents come to AWS
+description=OpenAI GPT models, Codex, and Managed Agents are now available on AWS, enabling enterprises to build secure AI in their AWS environments.
